title: An Act designating Fred Korematsu Day of Civil Liberties and the Constitution

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Uyterhoeven of Somerville, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 3427) of Erika Uyterhoeven for the annual issuance of a proclamation by the Governor setting apart January 30 of each year as Fred Korematsu day of civil liberties and the Constitution.  State Administration and Regulatory Oversight.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight

related_entities.name: committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 06/04/2025 from 11:00 AM-05:00 PM in Gardner Auditorium
